title: Integrate RfHealthMetrics into lichen-meshtastic bridge for RX SNR/RSSI recording and density
description: Update MeshtasticBridge and related structs to hold RfHealthMetrics, record rx_rssi/rx_snr from incoming MeshPackets into EMA, compute/update load_factor and density from hash or announcements, expose metrics for adaptive SF. Ensure no_std compatible where possible. Match ccp vectors.
